name: bounty
description: Competitive multi-agent bug bounty for Codex: specialists hunt, vote, fix, and score claims.

interface.shortDescription: Competitive multi-agent bug discovery for Codex
interface.longDescription: Launch a competitive bug hunt across a codebase. Recon maps the terrain, specialists submit claims, peers vote down weak findings, and confirmed issues can be fixed and reviewed before shipping.
defaultPrompt: Run the bounty skill on this repo and hunt for medium-severity bugs.
Use bounty in report-only mode on src/payments.
Use bounty-cleanup to remove old bounty state and branches.
